programme.title: Gotti: Godfather & Son
programme.desc: John Gotti Jr. attends New York Military Academy as his father rises to power in the world of organized crime; in his 20s, Gotti Jr. becomes a made member of the Gambino crime family.

programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.desc: Hazing, drug use and violence envelop Clark County Jail; two participants consider dropping out of the program.

programme.desc: Chaos ensues in the Clark County Jail when two pod bosses threaten the safety of three of the participants.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: The jailed civilians deal with harassment, violence and the stress of incarceration as they continue to grind out their time; two of the participants approach a tipping point.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: The remaining six participants face turning points; Ashleigh has a life-altering realization; Quintin and Sheri feel conflicted as they go deep under cover; Monalisa and Dion realize that they cannot escape their pasts.

programme.desc: New challenges arise after the men switch pods; the women suspect a snitch in their midst.

programme.desc: Ryan, Quintin and the other inmates of C-Pod wake up to raw sewage spewing out of their floor drain; as the odious situation threatens to invade F-Pod, the jail's water supply is shut off.

programme.desc: Following the repair of the sewer line, the participants return to their pods only to encounter new challenges and threats.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.sub-title: Fulton County Jail: Welcome to the A-T-L
programme.desc: Innocent civilians selected to infiltrate Atlanta's Fulton County Jail include a special-education teacher who works with at-risk youth and a former corrections officer who wants to see what it is like when the roles are reversed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: The first five participants enter the Fulton County Jail and are immediately met with drug use, sexual behavior and what it feels like to be locked in a cell for 12 hours.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: As the undercover civilians settle into the Fulton County Jail and new members enter, inmate suspicions and power plays keep the participants on edge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: Lockdowns result following a violent fight in the women's pod and an abuse of power in pod 600, proving that the luck of the draw with cellmates directly influences the jail experience.
